title: Battle of Harrsk's fortress
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Ismaren plot]][[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Teradoc's fortress]][[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] |image= |name=Battle of Harrsk's fortress |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Imperial Civil War]]) |date=[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |place=Near [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]], [[Kalist system/Legends|Kalist system]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |result=[[Federated Teradoc Union]] victory |side1=[[Zero Command]] |side2=Federated Teradoc Union |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Kratas]] † |commanders2=[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*12 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] **[[Firestorm (Imperial-class)|''Firestorm'']] **[[Shockwave (Imperial-class)|''Shockwave'']] **[[Whirlwind (Imperial-class)|''Whirlwind'']] |forces2=*73 [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] **''[[13X]]'' |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*''Shockwave'' destroyed *3 ISDs damaged |casual2=*11 ships destroyed |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|He's trying to destroy my flagship! He wants to humiliate me.|[[Lord High Admiral]] [[Blitzer Harrsk]], about [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]]|}} The '''Battle of Harrsk's fortress''' was a skirmish in the [[Imperial Civil War]]. ==Background== {{Quote|We've detected incoming ships, moving fast. More of the out-system spy holocams triggered alarms, a dozen more ships coming from below the orbital plane this time. I've spotted seventy.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Kratas]]|}} [[File:Daala3.jpg|thumb|left|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]].]] Upon learning that [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] would be visiting the world of his nemesis, [[Warlord/Legends|Supreme Warlord]] [[Blitzer Harrsk]], [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]] sent his [[Crimson Command]] on a mission to humiliate Harrsk. ==The battle== {{Quote|We can't hold out much longer. Shields failing. Admiral, I...|Kratas' last words, to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]]|}} Just as Harrsk was showing off his assembled fleet of [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] to Daala, the [[Crimson Command]] force arrived in-system under the command of [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], with orders to destroy Harrsk's prized [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Shockwave (Imperial-class)|''Shockwave'']]. [[File:GiladPellaeon.jpg|thumb|right|140px|[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]].]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Kratas]], Daala's second-in-command, was touring the ''Shockwave'' and assumed command of the counterattack. Concentrating firepower on the large ship, Pellaeon's forces managed to overpower its shields and destroy it, damaging three other ships at the cost of eleven of their own. {{Quote|Oh Kratas, I'm sorry.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] upon Kratas's death|}} ==Aftermath== {{Quote|I have no intention of assisting you in your childish brawl, Warlord Harrsk. You just lost me the best commander I ever had. I will not perpetuate this.''"
"''Stormtroopers! [sic] Take Admiral Daala to one of my Star Destroyers. She will command our retaliatory strike against High Admiral Teradoc. If she refuses, you will execute her immediately for treason.|Admiral Daala and Warlord Harrsk|}} In response, Harrsk forced Admiral Daala into his service, and the two took the remaining eight star destroyers to Teradoc's sphere of influence but the [[Battle of Teradoc's fortress|strike]] was prematurely stopped by the intervention of Daala. This led to the series of events which culminated in the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] meeting at [[Tsoss Beacon/Legends|Tsoss Beacon]] and the unification of the [[Imperial Remnant]] under Admiral Daala and Vice Admiral Pellaeon. ==Behind the scenes== ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' identified Harrsk's capital world as [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist]]. ==Appearances== *[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{DB|character|giladpellaeon|Pellaeon, Gilad}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 12 ABY}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de la fortaleza de Harrsk }} [[Category:Battles of the Imperial Civil War|Harrsk's fortress]]
